eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Jackson, OR; at 8:05 PM on JUL 15, 2026 Effective until 8:05 AM JUL 16, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Jackson County Sheriff's Office has issued a Level 2 BE SET to evacuate for zone JAC-112 near along Tiller-Trail Hwy north of Taylor Rd due to Evans Creek Fire. Monitor local government sources for evacuation and incident updates
